techniqueCuesZh: 五点支撑建立稳定底座：后脑勺、上背/肩胛、臀部贴凳，双脚踏实地面。
肩胛后缩下沉（向中间夹紧、向下收），全程保持脊柱中立、核心收紧。
握距略宽于肩（不要过宽），拇指环握杠铃，手腕叠在杠铃与肘部正上方。
控制下放到胸骨中部，肘部适度内收（不外展到 90°）；下放吸气、上推呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up in five points of contact: keep the back of your head, upper back/shoulder blades, and glutes on the bench, and both feet flat on the floor for a stable base.
Retract and depress your shoulder blades, pinching them together and tucking them down, then keep the spine neutral and core braced throughout the lift.
Grip the bar just outside shoulder width (avoid an excessively wide grip) with thumbs wrapped around the bar, stacking your wrists directly over the bar and elbows.
Lower the bar under control to the mid-chest with elbows tucked moderately (not flared to 90 degrees); inhale on the way down and exhale as you press up.
exercises.evidenceTag: Noteboom et al., Frontiers in Physiology (2024)

techniqueCuesZh: 靠背调到约 30 至 45 度的中等斜度，先坐稳把哑铃放在大腿上，再一只一只送到肩膀位置躺下，让后脑、上背和臀部贴实靠垫，双脚踏实地面。
肩胛向下、向后收紧并压进靠垫保持不动，核心收紧，腰背留一点自然小弓，既保护肩关节，又让上胸主导发力。
双臂沿各自轨迹向上并略向内推，直到两只哑铃在上胸正上方几乎相触；肘部大致位于手腕正下方、与躯干约成 45 度（不要外展到 90 度）。
控制下放，直到上胸有明显拉伸感——哑铃可以比杠铃下得更深一点；下放时吸气，上推时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the bench to a moderate incline of about 30 to 45 degrees, sit back with a dumbbell on each thigh, and kick them up to your shoulders one at a time so your head, upper back, and glutes settle firmly against the pad with both feet flat on the floor.
Pull your shoulder blades down and back into the bench and keep them pinned there, brace your core, and hold a slight natural arch so your shoulders stay protected and your upper chest does the work.

Press both dumbbells up and slightly inward until they nearly touch over your upper chest with elbows roughly under the wrists at about a 45-degree angle from your torso (not flared to 90 degrees), keeping each arm tracking on its own path.
Lower under control until you feel a stretch across the upper chest, letting the dumbbells drop a touch deeper than a barbell would allow; inhale on the way down and exhale as you drive up.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Incline Chest Press

techniqueCuesEn: Lie supine on a flat bench keeping five points of contact (head, upper back/shoulders, glutes, both feet flat); preserve a neutral spine and avoid excessive low-back arching.
Depress and retract your shoulder blades firmly into the bench before pressing, and keep them retracted throughout to stabilize the shoulders.
Hold each dumbbell with a closed, secure grip and a neutral wrist (no flexion/extension); start with arms extended and the weights at or just below eye level.
Lower under control toward the mid-chest, slightly toward the armpits, then press both dumbbells up in unison to full elbow extension without bouncing.
techniqueCuesZh: 仰卧平凳保持五点支撑（头、上背/肩、臀、双脚踏实）；脊柱中立、避免过度弓腰。
推之前肩胛下沉后缩压向凳面，全程保持后缩稳住肩。
每只哑铃闭握、手腕中立（不前屈后伸）；起始手臂伸直、哑铃在眼睛高度或略低。
控制下放到胸中部、略偏腋窝，再双手同步推到肘部完全伸直、不反弹。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Chest Press (dumbbell)

techniqueCuesZh: 调座椅高度，让握把对齐胸口中段（约乳头高度）；座深设到握把起始不深过胸口，避免肩关节被过度后拉拉伸。
后背贴紧靠垫坐稳，双脚踏实地面（或踏板）；收紧腹部、保持腰部自然生理曲度，别把整条脊柱硬压进靠背。
肩胛向后下方收紧、抵住靠垫，全程保持不松；拇指环握握把，手腕与前臂成一条直线保持中立。
顺畅向前推到肘部接近伸直但不锁死，再控制回放到充分而不痛的伸展位；推出时呼气、回放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Adjust the seat height so the handles line up with mid-chest level (around nipple height); set the seat depth so the handles start no deeper than your chest, keeping shoulders out of an over-stretched position.
Sit with your back firmly against the pad and feet flat on the floor (or foot rests); brace your abs and keep the natural arch in your low back without forcing your spine into the backrest.
Pull your shoulder blades back and down against the pad and hold that position the whole set, gripping the handles with thumbs wrapped and wrists stacked neutral in line with your forearms.
Press the handles forward smoothly until your elbows are nearly straight but not locked, then lower under control to a full but pain-free stretch; exhale as you push out, inhale as you return.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Chest Press

techniqueCuesZh: 两侧滑轮调到略高于肩的高度、装单手柄，双手各握一个，向前迈一步成前后错步站姿，让绳索一开始就有张力、双臂向身体两侧打开。
从髋部略微前倾，保持挺拔的脊柱中立，挺胸、肩胛下沉后收；收紧核心，让躯干稳住不动，只让手臂发力。
全程肘部保持固定的微屈（这是夹胸不是推胸），双手沿大弧线在胸前合拢，用手腕带动而不是耸肩前缩。
双手相遇时夹紧胸肌、稍作停顿，合拢时呼气；吸气并控制着把手臂张开回到舒适的拉伸位（大约到胸的高度），不要把肩拉得过开。
techniqueCuesEn: Set both pulleys slightly above shoulder height with single handles, grip one in each hand, and step forward into a staggered stance so the cables are under tension and your arms are outstretched to the sides.
Take a slight forward lean from the hips with a tall, neutral spine, chest up and shoulder blades set down and back; brace your core so your torso stays still and only the arms move.

Keep a fixed, slight bend in the elbows throughout (this is a fly, not a press) and sweep your hands together in a wide arc out in front of your chest, leading with the wrists rather than crunching the shoulders forward.

Squeeze the chest and pause briefly as the hands meet, exhaling on the way in; inhale and let the arms open back out under control to a comfortable stretch (about chest level) without overstretching the shoulders.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Standing Chest Fly

techniqueCuesEn: Grip the bar with an overhand (pronated) grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width; sit tall with thighs locked under the pad, chest up.
Brace your abs to keep a neutral spine and lean back no more than ~30 degrees; avoid arching the low back or swinging the torso.
Before pulling, depress and retract your shoulder blades (pull them down and back) and keep them set throughout the rep.
Drive your elbows down toward your sides to bring the bar to your upper chest, then control the bar all the way back up to full elbow extension.
techniqueCuesZh: 正手握杠（掌心朝前）、握距略宽于肩；坐直、大腿固定在垫下，挺胸。
收紧腹部保持脊柱中立，后仰不超过约 30°；不要弓腰或甩动躯干。
下拉前先肩胛下沉后缩（向下向后收），全程保持这个状态。
肘部向身体两侧下压，把杠拉到上胸，再控制还原到肘部完全伸直。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Lat Pulldown

techniqueCuesEn: Sit tall with a neutral spine: brace your abs and keep the natural arch in your low back; do not round forward or press your low back into the pad.
Initiate the pull by depressing and retracting your shoulder blades (pull them back and down) before bending the elbows.
Drive your elbows back toward your torso, keeping them close to your sides, and pull the handle to your mid-torso; keep wrists neutral, in line with your forearms.
Avoid leaning back or jerking with momentum; return under control, resisting the weight while keeping your chest up and torso upright.
techniqueCuesZh: 坐直、脊柱中立：收紧腹部、保持腰部自然弓，不前弓也不把腰压向靠垫。
先肩胛下沉后缩（向后向下收）再屈肘发力。
肘部向后带、贴近身体两侧，把握把拉向腹中部；手腕中立、与前臂成一线。
不后仰、不靠惯性甩；控制还原、对抗阻力，全程挺胸、躯干挺直。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Row

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚约与髋至肩同宽站立，屈髋、膝盖微屈，上身前倾到与地面约 30–60°。
收紧核心、全程脊柱中立平直，腰部不弓圆，目视前方地面让颈部与脊柱成一线。
正手握杠（掌心向下）、握距略宽于肩，手腕、肘、肩成一线。
肘部向后带（不外展），把杠铃拉向下肋/上腹，再受控下放、不靠甩动躯干借力。
techniqueCuesEn: Set your stance feet about hip- to shoulder-width apart, then hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend until your torso is roughly 30-60 degrees from the floor.
Brace your core and keep a neutral, flat spine throughout the set; do not let your lower back round, and keep your neck in line by looking at the floor ahead.
Grip the bar overhand, slightly wider than shoulder-width, with wrists, elbows, and shoulders stacked in line.
Drive your elbows back (not flared out) and pull the bar to your lower ribs or upper abdomen, then lower under control without jerking the torso.
exercises.evidenceTag: Fenwick et al., J Strength Cond Res (2009)

techniqueCuesZh: 采用三点支撑：同侧膝盖和手撑在平凳上（手在肩正下方、膝在髋正下方），训练侧脚踏实地面，哑铃在肩膀正下方自然垂直伸直。
躯干大致与地面平行，背部保持平直、颈部中立（目光看向斜下方）；全程收紧核心，不要弓背、也不要塌腰。
用肘部带动向上向后发力，肘部贴近身体侧面，把哑铃拉向髋部/下肋方向，顶峰时收紧肩胛骨——不要靠转体、扭腰把重量甩上去。
控制下放到底部充分拉伸（让肩胛略微前伸，但脊柱不塌不弓）；上拉时呼气，下放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up in a three-point stance: place the same-side knee and hand on a flat bench (hand under shoulder, knee under hip), with the working-side foot planted on the floor and the dumbbell hanging at arm's length below your shoulder.
Keep your torso roughly parallel to the floor with a flat back and neutral neck (eyes down); brace your core and do not let the spine round or the lower back arch throughout the set.

Drive your elbow up and back, leading with the elbow and keeping it close to your side, pulling the dumbbell toward your hip/lower ribs while you retract the shoulder blade at the top — do not rotate or twist the torso to heave the weight up.
Lower the dumbbell under control to a full stretch at the bottom (let the shoulder blade reach forward slightly without rounding the spine); exhale as you row up, inhale as you lower.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Single-arm Row

techniqueCuesZh: 滑轮调到与头同高或略高，挂上绳索把手；双手以正握（掌心向下）的闭合握法各抓一端，后退绷紧绳索，身体站直、双脚平行、膝盖微屈，建立稳定底座。
面对器械、手臂朝滑轮伸直；上身挺直（别向后仰借力）、挺胸、核心收紧，让后束三角肌和上背发力，而不是靠身体晃动甩重量。
先后缩肩胛启动，再把绳索拉向面部：肘部向外、向上张开（要高，别贴到肋骨旁），同时前臂外旋，让双手最终停在耳朵两侧。
拉到绳索中间的连接扣靠近面部、后束三角肌和中背明显收紧，再控制着回放到手臂完全伸直；拉的时候呼气，回放的时候吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the cable pulley at or just above head height and attach a rope handle; grasp both ends with a closed, pronated (palms-down) grip and step back to take the slack, standing tall with feet parallel and knees slightly bent for a stable base.

Stand facing the machine with arms extended toward the pulley; keep your torso upright (resist leaning back), chest tall, and core braced so the rear delts and upper back do the work rather than your bodyweight swinging the load.

Initiate by retracting your shoulder blades, then pull the rope toward your face by flaring the elbows out and up (high, not down by your ribs) while externally rotating the forearms so your hands finish beside your ears.

Pull until the rope's center clasp is near your face and you feel the rear delts and mid-back squeeze, then return under control to full arm extension; exhale as you pull and inhale as you let the weight back.
exercises.evidenceTag: NSCA Kinetic Select: Face Pull (Machine)

techniqueCuesZh: 坐直靠在调直的椅背上（或站姿、双脚约与髋同宽），后脑勺、上背与臀部贴实，双脚踏稳地面；收紧核心建立稳定底座。
把哑铃举到肩高，正握、拇指环握（掌心朝前），铃略宽于肩，手腕叠在肘部正上方、前臂保持竖直。
双臂同步把哑铃向上、略向内推到肘部完全伸直，全程沉住肋廓、避免腰部塌陷反弓。
控制下放到肩/耳高度做满全程，下放时吸气、上推时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Sit tall against the bench's upright backrest (or stand with a hip-width stance) with your head, upper back, and glutes in contact and both feet flat on the floor; brace your core to lock in a stable base.

Bring the dumbbells to shoulder height with a pronated, closed grip (palms facing forward, thumbs wrapped) and the bells just outside shoulder width, wrists stacked over the elbows and forearms vertical.
Press both dumbbells up and slightly together in unison until the elbows are fully extended, keeping the ribcage down and avoiding any arch in your lower back.
Lower under control until the dumbbells return to shoulder/ear height for a full range of motion; inhale as you lower and exhale as you press up.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Overhead Press (Dumbbell)

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚与髋同宽站立（想更稳可采用前后分腿站姿），双手各握一只哑铃、中立握（掌心朝向大腿），哑铃自然垂在大腿两侧、肘部保持固定的微屈。
收紧核心、肩胛下沉并后缩（向下、向后收），全程保持躯干直立不晃动，避免耸肩或借惯性把哑铃甩起来。
以肘部带动，将哑铃向身体两侧上举至与肩同高（大臂与地面平行）；接近顶端时把哑铃前端微微上倾，像倒水壶那样，让三角肌中束更好发力。
上举不超过肩高（过高会把发力转到斜方肌）；上举时呼气、下放时吸气，缓慢有控制地把哑铃放回大腿两侧。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand with feet hip-width (or in a slight split stance for stability), hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing your thighs), and let the dumbbells rest just outside your thighs with a soft, fixed bend in the elbows.
Brace your core and depress and retract your shoulder blades (pull them down and back), and keep your torso upright and still throughout, so you don't shrug or swing the weights up with momentum.

Lead with your elbows and raise the dumbbells up and out to the sides until your arms reach shoulder height (parallel to the floor); as you near the top, tilt the front of the dumbbells slightly up, as if pouring out a pitcher, to load the side delt.
Raise no higher than shoulder level (going higher shifts work to the traps), exhale as you lift and inhale as you lower the dumbbells slowly and under control back to your thighs.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Lateral Raise

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚与肩同宽站稳，双手各握一只哑铃自然垂于体侧，采用旋后握法（掌心朝前、拇指环握手柄）。
收紧核心、挺胸，肩膀后收下沉；上臂夹紧贴住肋廓，全程让肘部固定在体侧不乱动。
只靠屈肘把哑铃举起，手腕保持中立（不要勾腕或翻转），不要借身体摆动，也别让肘部往前跑。
上举时呼气并在顶端挤压肱二头肌，下放时吸气、全程控制慢放到手臂接近伸直再做下一次。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging at your sides in a supinated grip (palms facing forward, thumbs wrapped around the handle).
Brace your core and keep your chest up, shoulders back and down; pin your upper arms against your ribcage so your elbows stay fixed at your sides throughout the set.
Curl the dumbbells up by bending only at the elbows, keeping the wrists neutral (no flexing or rolling), and stop short of swinging the torso or letting the elbows drift forward.
Exhale as you curl up and squeeze the biceps at the top, then inhale and lower under control through the full range until the arms are nearly straight before the next rep.

techniqueCuesZh: 采用前后分腿站姿（一只脚略微在前），双脚约与髋同宽，双手各握一只哑铃垂于大腿两侧，用闭合中立握法——掌心相对，拇指环扣握把。
收紧核心、躯干保持直立，上臂夹紧贴住身体两侧、肘部固定原位——不要让肘往前跑或前后摆动，也不要耸肩或借助身体晃动把重量甩上去。
保持中立握法（虎口朝上）和手腕中立伸直，只在肘关节屈曲把哑铃举到肩前，顶峰时收紧屈肘肌群。
控制下放，一直降到肘部完全伸直，做满全程；上举时呼气、下放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall in a split stance (one foot slightly ahead) with feet about hip-width, a dumbbell in each hand at your thighs using a closed neutral grip — palms facing each other, thumbs wrapped around the handles.

Brace your core and keep your torso upright; pin your upper arms against your sides and keep your elbows fixed in place — don't let them drift forward or swing, and don't shrug or rock to swing the weight up.
Keeping the neutral (thumbs-up) grip and a straight wrist, curl the dumbbells by bending only at the elbows until they reach the front of your shoulders, squeezing the elbow flexors at the top.
Lower under control all the way until your elbows are fully extended for a complete range of motion; exhale as you curl up and inhale as you lower.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Hammer Curl (American Council on Exercise)

techniqueCuesZh: 滑轮挂到最高位，装直杆或绳索；面对配重片站立，距离约一前臂长，双脚与髋同宽、膝盖微屈建立稳定底座。
与肩同宽正握（掌心向下），脊柱中立挺拔、自髋部略微前倾，收紧核心让躯干全程稳定不晃。
上臂和肘部紧贴体侧当作固定支点，只有前臂转动；一旦肘部前移或耸肩，背阔肌和肩部就会代偿、把三头肌的发力抢走。
控制下压走弧线，直到肘部完全锁定、三头肌彻底收缩，再缓慢回放到胸高处充分拉伸；下压时呼气、回放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the cable pulley to the highest position and attach a straight bar or rope; stand facing the stack about a forearm's length away, feet hip-width apart with knees slightly bent for a stable base.
Grip the bar shoulder-width with an overhand (palms-down) grip, keep a tall neutral spine with a slight forward lean from the hips, and brace your core so your torso stays still throughout.

Pin your upper arms and elbows tight against your sides as fixed pivots—only the forearms move; if your elbows drift forward or your shoulders shrug up, the lats and shoulders take over and steal work from the triceps.

Push the bar down in a controlled arc until the elbows lock out fully and the triceps fully contract, then let it rise slowly to a full stretch at chest height; exhale as you press down, inhale as you return.
exercises.evidenceTag: Hussain et al., "Muscle Fatigue in the Three Heads of Triceps Brachii During Intensity and Speed Variations of Triceps Push-Down Exercise," Frontiers in Physiology (2020)

techniqueCuesZh: 和标准卧推一样建立五点支撑（后脑勺、上背、臀部贴凳，双脚踏实地面），握距收到约与肩同宽或略窄于肩（大约是两肩间距的 95%），不要窄到手腕塌陷或双手相碰。
肩胛后缩下沉、核心收紧；手腕叠在肘部正上方，让重量沿前臂垂直下传，避免手腕向后折。
控制下放，杠铃落向下胸/上腹位置，全程肘部贴近躯干内收（不要外展张开）——窄握正是靠这一点把发力转到肱三头肌并保护肩关节。
下放时吸气、保持身体紧绷，轻触胸口；上推时呼气，靠伸肘把杠铃推起，在胸口上方锁定，不要借胸口弹起反弹。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up just like a standard bench with five points of contact (head, upper back, and glutes on the bench, both feet flat on the floor), then grip the barbell at roughly shoulder width or slightly inside it — about 95% of the distance between your shoulders — not so narrow that your wrists collapse or your hands touch.

Retract and depress your shoulder blades and brace your core; keep your wrists stacked directly over your elbows so the load travels straight down through your forearms rather than bending your wrists back.

Lower the bar under control toward your lower chest/upper-abdomen while keeping your elbows tucked close to your ribs (do not let them flare outward), since the narrow grip is what shifts the work onto the triceps and protects the shoulders.
Inhale and stay tight as you lower to a light touch on the chest, then exhale and drive the bar up by extending the elbows, locking out over the chest without bouncing the bar off your body.
exercises.evidenceTag: Lockie et al., Sports (Basel), 2017 — "An Investigation of the Mechanics and Sticking Region of a One-Repetition Maximum Close-Grip Bench Press versus the Traditional Bench Press"

techniqueCuesZh: 杠铃横置上背（斜方肌/后肩），不压颈；握距略宽于肩，挺胸夹肩胛建立稳定支撑。
双脚约与肩同宽或略宽，脚尖略外展，全程全脚掌着地、脚跟不离地。
保持脊柱中立（腰部自然微弓）、上身挺直；下蹲前先收紧核心，避免弓背或过度前倾。
控制下蹲、髋向后坐，膝盖顺脚尖方向外展（不内扣），蹲到脊柱能保持中立的深度，再蹬地、髋膝同步起身。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the bar across the upper back (on the traps/rear shoulders), not on the neck; grip slightly wider than shoulder-width, lift the chest and squeeze the shoulder blades together to build a stable shelf.
Stand with feet about shoulder-width or slightly wider, toes turned out slightly, and keep the whole foot planted with the heels down through the entire rep.
Keep a neutral spine with a slight natural lumbar arch and an upright chest; brace your core before descending and avoid rounding or excessive forward lean.

Descend with control by sitting the hips back and tracking the knees out over the toes (no inward collapse) to a depth you can reach with a neutral spine, then drive the feet into the floor and extend hips and knees to stand.
exercises.evidenceTag: Kushner et al., Strength and Conditioning Journal (2015)

techniqueCuesZh: 先靠稳机器：后背和肩胛贴紧背垫，肩膀牢牢顶进肩垫下方，双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板上、脚尖略微外展——身体稳住后再解开安全把手。
脚的高低要刻意选：脚踩中下方膝盖前移更多、更顶大腿前侧（股四头）；踩高一点则更多分给臀部和腘绳肌。全脚掌（尤其脚跟）踩实，绝不让脚跟离板。
全程后背、臀部贴紧靠垫，核心收紧——机器帮你撑住躯干，正因如此更要忍住别塌腰、别在最低点让臀部翘离靠垫。
控制下放到大腿至少与踏板平行（膝盖约 90°，柔韧性够可再深），再用全脚掌伸膝伸髋蹬起；下放吸气、蹬起呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up against the machine: place your back and shoulders flat against the padded back rest, wedge your shoulders firmly under the shoulder pads, and put your feet shoulder-width on the platform with toes slightly turned out — disengage the safety handles only once you are braced.

Choose your foot height intentionally: a mid-to-low foot position drives more knee travel and quad emphasis, while a higher position shifts load toward the glutes and hamstrings; keep your whole foot (especially the heels) planted and never let the heels lift.

Keep your back and hips flat against the pad and your core braced throughout — because the machine supports your trunk, resist the urge to round your lower back or let your hips peel off the pad at the bottom.

Lower under control until your thighs reach at least parallel to the footplate (about 90 degrees of knee bend or deeper if mobility allows), then drive up through your whole foot by extending knees and hips; inhale on the way down and exhale as you press up.
exercises.evidenceTag: Clark DR, Lambert MI, Hunter AM. "Trunk Muscle Activation in the Back and Hack Squat at the Same Relative Loads." Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research (NSCA), 2019.

techniqueCuesEn: Sit with your back and tailbone flat against the backrest, brace your abdominals, and grip the side handles to keep your spine stable and your hips down throughout.
Set feet shoulder-width on the middle of the platform with toes pointing slightly out; keep your whole foot, especially the heels, pressed flat into the plate.
Lower under control until your knees reach roughly 90 degrees, going only as deep as you can without your lower back rounding or your hips rolling off the pad.
Press the platform away through your heels and forefoot, extending knees and hips, but stop short of locking out the knees to keep tension on the muscles and protect the joint.
techniqueCuesZh: 后背与尾骨贴实靠背、收紧腹部、握住两侧把手稳住脊柱、臀部不离垫。
双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板中部、脚尖略外展；全脚掌尤其脚跟踩实踏板。
控制下放到膝盖约 90°，只下到腰不弓圆、臀不离垫的深度。
经脚跟与前掌把踏板蹬开、伸膝伸髋，但膝盖不锁死，保持张力、护膝。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Leg Press

techniqueCuesZh: 正手闭握杠铃（掌心向下）、约与肩同宽，双脚与髋同宽、重心落足中。
膝盖保持微屈并全程维持这个角度，靠髋向后推来折叠、而非继续屈膝。
保持脊柱中立拉长、挺胸、肩胛下沉；下巴微收、目视地面。
杠铃贴身下放到腘绳肌有牵拉感（约膝盖下方），一旦脊柱无法保持中立即停，再发力顶髋起身。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up with a closed, pronated (palms-down) grip on the bar, hands about shoulder-width apart, feet hip-width with weight balanced over the midfoot.
Keep the knees slightly flexed and hold that bend throughout, hinging by pushing the hips back rather than bending the knees further.
Maintain a neutral, lengthened spine with the chest up and shoulder blades pulled down; keep the chin lightly tucked and gaze toward the floor.

Lower the bar close to the body until you feel a stretch in the hamstrings (around just below the knee), stopping the moment a neutral spine can no longer be maintained, then drive the hips forward to stand.
exercises.evidenceTag: NSCA Exercise Technique Manual for Resistance Training, 3rd ed. (2019)

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向大腿（中立握），手臂自然垂直，膝盖保持轻微固定的微屈，全程不变。
脊柱中立、核心收紧：肩胛向下向后收，挺起胸口，让哑铃轻贴大腿前侧，使重量始终贴近身体。
靠髋部向后推来折叠（不是下蹲），哑铃沿大腿和小腿前侧下滑，小腿尽量保持竖直，背部始终保持平直。
下放到哑铃约到小腿中段、腘绳肌有明显牵拉感即可，不要弓腰塌背；下放时吸气，再顶髋向前、呼气站直，顶端夹紧臀部。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand with feet hip-width apart, a dumbbell in each hand using a neutral (palms-facing-thighs) grip, arms hanging straight, and a soft, fixed bend in the knees that you hold throughout.
Set the spine neutral and brace your core: pull the shoulder blades down and back, lift the chest, and let the dumbbells rest lightly against the front of your thighs to keep the load close.
Hinge by pushing the hips straight back (not by squatting down), sliding the dumbbells down along your thighs and shins while shins stay near vertical and the back stays flat.

Lower until you feel a strong hamstring stretch (around mid-shin) without rounding the lower back; inhale on the way down, then drive the hips forward and exhale to stand tall, squeezing the glutes at the top.
exercises.evidenceTag: NASM Exercise Library: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift

techniqueCuesZh: 俯卧趴在垫上，让膝关节中点对准机器的转轴（旋转中心），脚踝滚垫卡在小腿后侧下段（脚跟略上方），别压在跟腱或脚后跟上。
双手握住把手，髋部压实垫面，收紧腹部保持脊柱中立，弯举时别让腰部塌腰或离开垫面。
屈膝把脚跟向臀部弯起，控制住让滚垫平稳移动，顶峰用力夹紧腘绳肌，不要甩动、也别用髋部借力晃重量。
弯起时呼气夹紧，下放时吸气、全程控制慢放到膝盖接近伸直（别让配重片砸下去）。
techniqueCuesEn: Lie face-down on the pad and line up the mid-point of your knee joint with the machine's pivot point (axis of rotation), then set the ankle roller against the back of your lower shin (just above the heel), not on the Achilles or heel.
Grip the handles, press your hips into the pad, and brace your abdominals to keep your spine neutral so your lower back doesn't arch or lift as you curl.
Curl your heels toward your glutes by bending the knees, moving the pad smoothly under control and squeezing the hamstrings hard at the top without yanking or using your hips to swing the weight.
Exhale and squeeze as you curl up, then inhale and lower under control through the full range until the knees are nearly straight (don't let the stack slam).
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Lying Hamstrings Curl

techniqueCuesZh: 先调机器：先设好配重，再调座位和护垫，让两腿向前伸直、略低于髋部，前脚掌踏在踏板上，脚跟悬空可以落到踏板下方。
贴紧靠背坐直，脊柱中立、核心收紧，腿保持伸直（膝盖微松、别锁死），让发力集中在小腿、不压到膝盖。
用前脚掌发力，脚尖尽量向下踩到最大跖屈，顶峰稍停一下夹紧小腿——不要靠惯性弹。
控制慢放，让脚跟落到踏板下方、充分拉伸到底以走满全程；上踩呼气、下放吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the machine first: adjust the load, then set the seat and pad so your legs extend straight out in front and rest slightly below hip level, with the balls of both feet on the platform and heels free to drop below it.
Sit tall against the back pad with a neutral spine and braced core, keeping your legs straight (knees soft, not locked) so the work stays on the calves and not the knees.
Drive through the balls of your feet, pressing the toes as far as possible into full plantar flexion, and pause briefly at the top to squeeze the calves—avoid bouncing.
Lower under control until you feel a deep stretch with the heels dropping below the platform for full range; exhale as you press up, inhale as you lower.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Calf Raise (selectorized weight machine), American Council on Exercise

techniqueCuesEn: Hold the dumbbell or kettlebell vertically against your chest, cupping the top end with both hands, and stand with feet about shoulder-width apart.
Keep your chest up and torso upright with a neutral, straight back throughout the movement; let the anterior load counterbalance you into a vertical trunk.
Sit the hips back and down, driving the knees out so they track over the toes (avoid letting the knees cave inward), with elbows staying close to the rib cage.
Descend until the thighs are at least parallel to the floor (hips below knees) as mobility allows, then drive through the heels/mid-foot to stand back up fully.
techniqueCuesZh: 竖握哑铃或壶铃抵在胸前、双手捧住上端，双脚约与肩同宽站立。
全程挺胸、躯干挺直、背部中立平直；前侧负重帮你保持躯干竖直。
髋向后向下坐、膝盖外展顺脚尖（不内扣），肘部贴近肋廓。
蹲到大腿至少与地面平行（髋低于膝）、活动度允许时更低，再经脚跟/中足发力站直。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Goblet Squat

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚与髋同宽站直，双手各握一只哑铃自然垂于体侧、掌心朝向大腿；让哑铃放松下垂，别耸肩、也别前后甩动。
迈出大步：一脚向前跨约一步半，让前侧小腿尽量接近垂直，前膝对准第二脚趾方向；上身保持挺直、与地面垂直，核心收紧、目视前方。
竖直下蹲（髋部沿垂直线下沉），直到前侧大腿接近与地面平行、后膝悬于地面上方，前后膝关节角度都不要小于约 90°；随后用前脚跟发力蹬回起始位。
下蹲时吸气、蹬起时呼气；控制完整动作幅度，不要在最低点借力反弹，也别让后膝砸到地面。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at arm's length by your sides, palms facing your thighs; let the weights hang and avoid shrugging or swinging them.

Set a long stride: step one foot forward roughly a stride-and-a-half so the front shin can stay near-vertical, keep that knee tracking over the second toe, and hold the torso tall and perpendicular to the floor with the core braced and gaze forward.

Lower straight down (hips moving on a vertical line) until the front thigh is about parallel and the rear knee hovers just above the floor, keeping both front and rear knee angles no sharper than about 90 degrees; then drive through the front heel to return to the start.
Inhale as you descend and exhale as you push back up; control the full range of motion and don't bounce off the bottom or let the rear knee crash into the floor.
exercises.evidenceTag: Riemann BL, Lapinski S, Smith L, Davies G. "Biomechanical Analysis of the Anterior Lunge During 4 External-Load Conditions." Journal of Athletic Training. 2012;47(4):372–378.

techniqueCuesZh: 仰卧平凳，双手各持一只哑铃在胸口正上方、掌心相对；双脚踏实地面，保持五点支撑（后脑/肩、臀贴凳，双脚落地）。
肩胛后缩下沉压向凳面，腰部保持自然小弧度，核心收紧，全程让胸肌主导发力、肩关节稳定不晃。
肘部保持微屈并锁定这个角度全程不变，用大臂带动哑铃沿宽弧线向两侧打开（动作发生在肩关节而非肘关节），别做成卧推。
控制下放到哑铃约与胸/肩齐平、胸部有明显牵拉感为止（肘不要低过凳面）；下放时吸气，再夹胸把哑铃合拢、上举时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Lie supine on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand, pressed up over your chest with palms facing each other; plant both feet flat on the floor and keep five points of contact (head, shoulders, glutes on the bench, feet down).
Retract and depress your shoulder blades into the bench and keep a slight natural arch in the lower back, bracing your core so the chest stays the prime mover and the shoulders stay set throughout.

Set a soft, fixed bend in your elbows and hold that exact angle the whole set; open the dumbbells out in a wide arc led by the upper arms (hinge at the shoulder, not the elbow) so you don't turn it into a press.

Lower under control until the dumbbells reach roughly chest/shoulder level and you feel a stretch across the chest (don't drop the elbows below the bench line); inhale on the way down, then squeeze the chest to bring the dumbbells together and exhale on the way up.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Lying Chest Fly

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚约与髋同宽、膝盖微屈，双手各持一只哑铃；从髋部前屈、臀部向后送，直到上身接近与地面平行，让哑铃自然垂在身体正下方、掌心相对。
背部保持平直、脊柱中立（不要弓背），核心收紧；手臂自然下垂、肘部保持一个固定的轻微弯曲，整组都维持这个角度不变。
用肘部带动，把哑铃沿弧线向两侧抬到肩高，专注用后束发力、而不是硬夹肩胛骨；到顶就停住，别靠惯性把重量甩上去。
选自己能控制住、能做满全程的轻到中等重量；上抬时呼气、顶端略停，再吸气、缓慢有控制地把哑铃放回起始位。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand with feet hip-width and a soft bend in the knees, holding a dumbbell in each hand; hinge at the hips and push your butt back until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor, letting the dumbbells hang straight down with palms facing each other.
Keep your back flat and spine neutral (don't round), brace your core, and let your arms hang with a slight, fixed bend at the elbows that you maintain for the whole set.

Lead with your elbows and raise the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc up to shoulder height, focusing on the rear delts rather than yanking the shoulder blades together; stop at the top instead of swinging the weight up with momentum.
Use a light-to-moderate weight you can control through a full range; exhale as you raise the dumbbells, pause briefly at the top, then inhale and lower them slowly back to the start under control.

techniqueCuesZh: 采用前后分腿站姿，双手共握一只哑铃：手掌从下方托住上端铃片，让哑铃竖直垂下；双手握法能让重量稳稳压在头顶正上方。
收紧核心、肩胛下沉后缩（向下、向后收），头颈与脊柱保持中立，重量举过头时不要塌腰、不要挺肚子。
把哑铃竖直上举到手臂垂直、肘尖朝前并贴近头部（不要外张），顶端略微留一点不要彻底锁死，让肱三头肌全程保持张力。
控制着把哑铃下放到脑后，在肩关节舒适范围内尽量放到底以充分拉伸，全程只动肘关节、上臂保持不动；下放吸气、上举呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand in a staggered (split) stance and grip a single dumbbell with both hands, wrapping your palms around the underside of the top bell so it hangs vertically; this two-hand grip steadies the load directly overhead.

Brace your core and depress and retract your shoulder blades (pull them down and back), keeping your head and neck aligned with a neutral spine, and avoid arching your lower back as the weight goes overhead.

Press the dumbbell straight up until your arms are vertical with elbows pointing forward and kept close to your head (not flared out), stopping just short of full lockout to keep tension on the triceps.

Lower the dumbbell behind your head under control as far as your shoulders comfortably allow for a full stretch, moving only at the elbows and keeping your upper arms still; inhale on the way down and exhale as you press up.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Triceps Extension (two-hand dumbbell, overhead)

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚约与肩同宽、重心落足中建立稳定底座；握距略宽于肩、手腕叠在肘部正上方、握法稳固舒适。
全程收紧躯干、脊柱中立，臀腹收紧、肋骨下沉，不靠弓腰/过度后仰硬顶杠铃。
杠铃沿垂直线上推，头略后移避开面部，锁定时杠铃位于足中与肩正上方一线。
推到肘部充分但不强行锁定，再缓慢受控地下放回上胸前架位。
techniqueCuesEn: Set feet about shoulder-width apart with weight through the midfoot to build a stable base, and take a secure, comfortable grip just outside the shoulders with wrists stacked over the elbows.
Brace the trunk and keep the spine neutral throughout, glutes and abs tight, ribs down, do not arch or hyperextend the lower back to muscle the bar up.
Press the bar in a straight vertical line, moving the head slightly back so the bar clears the face, then finish with the bar stacked over the midfoot and shoulders.
Press to full but unforced elbow extension, then lower the bar slowly and under control back to the front-rack position on the upper chest.
exercises.evidenceTag: Kroell & Mike, Strength and Conditioning Journal (2017)

techniqueCuesZh: 杠铃位于足中正上方、贴近腿；收紧背阔肌让杠铃全程贴近小腿上拉。
全程脊柱中立：挺胸、头与脊柱成一线，背部保持平直不弓圆。
上拉前深吸气、收紧核心（像即将被打一拳），稳住躯干；避免长时间憋气。
腿蹬地发力、膝盖向两侧外推（“撑开地面”），让臀髋充分参与。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up with the bar over your midfoot and keep it close to your legs; engage your lats so the bar stays near your shins as you pull.
Keep a neutral spine throughout: lift the chest and keep the head in line so the back stays flat, not rounded.
Take a deep breath and brace your core (as if about to be punched) before pulling to stabilize the trunk; avoid prolonged breath-holding.
Drive through the floor with the legs and push the knees apart ("spread the floor") to keep the glutes and hips active.
exercises.evidenceTag: Wenning, NSCA TSAC Report (2014)

techniqueCuesZh: 杠铃架在锁骨上方的肩前，肘部高抬前顶、上臂大致与地面平行，手指仅起稳定作用。
双脚约与肩同宽、脚尖略外展，全程膝盖顺脚尖方向。
下蹲前深吸气至腹部、收紧核心；挺胸、脊柱中立，蹲到髋折低于膝顶。
经足中/脚跟发力起身，全程肘部保持高抬，让躯干挺直、上背不弓圆。
techniqueCuesEn: Rack the bar across the front of the shoulders above the collarbones, drive the elbows high and forward so the upper arms stay roughly parallel to the floor, and let the fingers only steady the bar.
Set feet about shoulder-width with toes turned slightly out, and track the knees in line with the toes through the whole rep.
Take a deep belly breath and brace the core before descending; keep the chest tall and the spine neutral, descending until hip crease is below the top of the knees.
Drive up through mid-foot/heels and keep the elbows up the entire time so the torso stays upright and the upper back does not round.
Set the bench to roughly a 30-45 degree incline; angles much steeper than 45 degrees shift the work onto the front delts and off the upper chest.
Before unracking, depress and retract your shoulder blades into the bench and keep head, upper back, hips, and feet in firm contact throughout to protect the shoulders and keep the spine neutral.
Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width with thumbs wrapped around it, and keep elbows tucked at about 30-60 degrees from the torso (not flared to 90) with wrists stacked over elbows.
Lower the bar under control to the upper chest just below the collarbone, touch without bouncing, then press up to nearly straight arms while keeping the shoulder blades retracted.
techniqueCuesZh: 凳面调到约 30–45° 上斜；远超 45° 会把负荷转到前束、离开上胸。
出杠前肩胛下沉后缩压向凳面，全程头、上背、臀、脚稳定贴实，护肩、脊柱中立。
握距略宽于肩、拇指环握，肘部与躯干约成 30–60°（不外展到 90°）、手腕叠在肘上方。
控制下放到锁骨下方的上胸，轻触不反弹，再推到手臂近伸直、肩胛保持后缩。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Incline Chest Press

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚约与肩同宽站直，掌心向上（旋后握）握杠，握距略宽于髋，手腕保持中立、稳定地叠在杠铃正上方。
肩胛后缩下沉、收紧核心，上臂夹紧贴住体侧，让肘部固定在躯干两侧作为唯一转动支点。
只靠屈肘把杠铃举起，全程保持前臂旋后，不要借助甩动或髋/腰发力把重量荡上去。
顶端挤压肱二头肌，再控制下放走完整行程直到肘部近乎伸直；上举时呼气、下放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall with feet about shoulder-width apart and grip the barbell with a supinated (palms-up) grip just outside hip width, wrists stacked neutral and stable over the bar.
Set your shoulder blades back and down, brace your core, and pin your upper arms against your sides so the elbows stay fixed at your torso as the pivot point.
Curl the bar up by flexing only at the elbows, keeping the forearms supinated and avoiding any swing or hip/back drive to throw the weight up.
Squeeze the biceps at the top, then lower under control through a full range until the elbows are nearly straight; exhale as you curl up and inhale as you lower.
exercises.evidenceTag: Marcolin et al., "Differences in electromyographic activity of biceps brachii and brachioradialis while performing three variants of curl," PeerJ (2018)

techniqueCuesEn: Sit with your upper back against a bench and position the padded barbell in the crease of your hips, just above the pelvis.
Set your feet shoulder-width so your shins are vertical (about a 90-degree knee angle) at the top of the lift; keep knees tracking over your toes.
Brace your core and drive your hips up by extending from the hips, keeping your spine and pelvis near-neutral; avoid excessive lower-back arching.
Keep your head and neck in line with your spine and stop at full hip extension when your torso is parallel to the floor.
techniqueCuesZh: 上背靠凳，把加垫的杠铃放在髋折处、略高于骨盆。
双脚与肩同宽，顶部时小腿竖直（膝约 90°）；膝盖顺脚尖方向。
收紧核心、伸髋顶起，脊柱与骨盆近中立；避免过度弓腰。
头颈与脊柱成一线，顶到髋充分伸展、躯干与地面平行即停。
exercises.evidenceTag: Contreras et al., Strength and Conditioning Journal (2011)

techniqueCuesEn: Set the rear foot on a knee-height bench and step the front foot far enough forward that, at the bottom, the front shin stays roughly vertical and the front knee tracks over the toes (not caving inward).
Keep the torso upright with ribs down, core braced, and spine neutral; avoid leaning excessively forward or hyperextending the lower back.
Lower under control, dropping straight down until the front thigh is about parallel to the floor, keeping weight on the mid-foot/heel of the front leg.
Drive up through the front foot to return to standing; let the front leg do the work rather than pushing off the rear leg.
techniqueCuesZh: 后脚搭在膝高的凳上，前脚向前迈够远，使底部时前侧小腿大致竖直、前膝顺脚尖（不内扣）。
躯干挺直、肋骨下沉、核心收紧、脊柱中立；不过度前倾、不弓腰后伸。
控制下蹲、垂直下沉到前侧大腿约与地面平行，重心在前脚的中足/脚跟。
经前脚发力起身；让前腿主导发力，而非靠后腿蹬。
exercises.evidenceTag: NASM Exercise Library: Bulgarian Split Squat

techniqueCuesZh: 调好座椅高度，让握把与肩齐平或略高于肩，然后满握握把（拇指环扣），手腕保持中立、与前臂成一条线。
双脚踏实地面或脚踏，收紧腹部稳住脊柱；挺直贴靠背垫，腰部既不要压平也不要塌腰拱起。
肩胛下沉后缩（向下、向后）并全程保持，肘部走在 4 点和 8 点方向（略偏身体前方、不要向两侧外展），以保护肩袖。
呼气把握把向上推到肘部完全伸直但不锁死，头部与脊柱保持一线；吸气并用背阔肌发力控制把重量沿全程缓缓拉回到肩部高度。
techniqueCuesEn: Adjust the seat height so the handles sit level with or just slightly above your shoulders, then grasp the handles with a full grip (thumbs wrapped around) and keep your wrists neutral, in line with your forearms.
Plant your feet firmly on the floor or footrests and brace your abs to stabilize your spine; sit tall against the pad without pressing your lower back flat into it or arching it.

Depress and retract your shoulder blades (down and back) and hold that position, keeping your elbows in the 4-and-8-o'clock plane (slightly forward of your torso, not flared out to the sides) to protect the rotator cuff.

Exhale and press the handles overhead until your elbows are fully extended but not locked out, keeping your head aligned with your spine; inhale and engage your lats to pull the weight back down under control through a full range to shoulder level.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Shoulder Press (Weight Machines / Selectorized)

techniqueCuesZh: 调好座椅高度（有胸垫就一并调），让把手大致与胸口中段齐平，手臂能完全前伸够到把手而肩膀不前缩；双脚踏实地面建立稳定底座。
坐直贴住靠背/胸垫，收紧腹部，腰部保持自然生理弯曲——别含胸前倾、也别过度塌腰；先把肩胛向后向下收，再开始拉。
以肘部贴近体侧、向后带动把手（手腕中立、与前臂成一线），一直拉到肘部越过躯干，感受是背部发力、而不是手臂在拉。
在收紧位稍作停顿，再控制把手缓慢回放到手臂完全伸直、肩胛向前充分伸展；拉的时候呼气，回放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Adjust the seat (and chest pad if present) so the handles sit roughly level with your mid-chest and your arms reach forward fully without your shoulders rounding; plant both feet flat for a stable base.
Sit tall against the back/chest pad, brace your abs, and keep a natural arch in your low back — don't round forward or over-arch; first pull your shoulder blades back and down before the arms move.

Drive the handles back by leading with your elbows close to your sides (neutral wrists in line with forearms), pulling until your elbows pass your torso and you feel your back — not your arms — do the work.
Squeeze briefly at the back, then return under control until your arms are fully extended and shoulder blades stretch forward; exhale as you pull, inhale as you let it return.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Seated Row

techniqueCuesZh: 坐在直立靠背凳上（或站姿挺直），双脚踩实；起始位双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向自己，双肘收在胸前、约与胸同高。
收紧核心、肋骨下沉，别塌腰挺肚；用肩部发力，不要靠后仰借力把哑铃甩上去。
上推的同时双腕向外旋转，到顶时掌心朝前、肘部接近但不锁死，全程让哑铃走在肩膀正上方（不要向两侧外翻打开）。
上推并旋转时呼气，反向旋回到掌心朝己的起始位时吸气；控制下放走完整行程，别让哑铃自由砸落。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up seated on an upright bench (or standing tall) with feet planted; hold a dumbbell in each hand at the bottom with palms facing your body, elbows tucked in front of your chest at roughly chest height.
Brace your core and keep your ribs down so you don't arch your lower back; let your shoulders do the work rather than leaning back to heave the weight up.

Press the dumbbells up and simultaneously rotate your wrists outward, finishing overhead with palms facing forward and elbows just short of lockout, keeping the weights tracking over your shoulders (not flaring wide).
Exhale as you press and rotate up, inhale as you reverse the rotation back to the palms-facing-you start; lower under control through the full range and avoid letting the dumbbells crash down.

techniqueCuesZh: 仰卧平凳，保持五点支撑（后脑、上背、臀部贴凳，双脚踏实地面），双手与肩同宽正握 EZ 杠或杠铃，把杠铃推到胸部正上方。
上臂略向头侧后倾（不要竖直 90°）并锁定这个肩部角度；核心收紧，肘部夹住、与肩对齐，全程别让它向外打开。
只屈肘、控制下放，把杠铃降向额头或头后方一点，上臂保持不动，让肱三头肌独立发力。
伸肘把杠铃推回，顶端不要完全锁死（保持肱三头肌持续张力）；下放吸气、上推呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Lie supine on a flat bench in five points of contact (head, upper back, glutes on the bench, both feet flat on the floor), and take an EZ-bar or barbell with a shoulder-width overhand grip pressed up over your chest.

Tilt your upper arms slightly back toward your head (not straight vertical) and lock that shoulder angle in place; brace your core and keep your elbows pinned in line with your shoulders rather than letting them flare out.
Bend only at the elbows to lower the bar under control toward your forehead or just behind your head, keeping your upper arms still so the triceps do all the work.
Drive the bar back up by extending the elbows without fully locking out at the top (to keep tension on the triceps); inhale as you lower and exhale as you press up.

techniqueCuesZh: 杠铃架在上斜方肌——颈根部那块肌肉隆起处，绝不压在颈椎或骨头上——双脚约与肩同宽，出杠前先把核心狠狠收紧。
膝盖保持轻微固定屈曲、小腿垂直地面；这是髋部铰链不是深蹲，臀部往后顶，而不是身体往下沉。
髋部后推完成前屈，躯干下放到大致与地面平行（或在腰背不弓的前提下尽量到位），感受腘绳肌被拉伸。
全程保持脊柱中立、用斜方肌把杠铃顶紧；下放时吸气并保持核心稳定，再顶髋站起、到顶时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Rack the barbell across your upper traps — the shelf of muscle at the base of your neck, never on the bony neck or spine itself — set feet about shoulder-width, and brace your core hard before you unrack.
Set a soft, fixed bend in the knees and keep your shins vertical; this is a hip hinge, not a squat, so push your hips straight back rather than dipping down.
Hinge forward by driving the hips back until your torso is roughly parallel to the floor (or as far as your hamstrings allow without the lower back rounding), feeling a stretch in the hamstrings.
Keep the spine neutral and the bar pulled tight into your traps throughout; inhale and brace as you hinge down, then drive the hips forward to stand and exhale at the top.
exercises.evidenceTag: Vigotsky, Harper, Ryan & Contreras, "Effects of load on good morning kinematics and EMG activity," PeerJ (2015)

techniqueCuesZh: 像硬拉起始位那样建立：杠铃位于脚掌中部正上方，双脚约与髋同宽，屈髋俯身，正握（手心朝下）、握距略宽于肩，小腿贴近杠铃。
俯身到躯干与地面平行（接近水平），每一次都保持这个角度；脊柱中立、核心狠狠收紧，上拉时躯干不要抬起、不要借惯性甩。
沿直线把杠铃爆发式拉向下胸/上腹，肘部向上向后带，顶峰把两侧肩胛骨夹紧。
控制下放，让杠铃片每次都完全落地（停顿/dead-stop）重置后再拉下一次；拉之前吸气收紧，下放时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up like a deadlift start: barbell over mid-foot, feet hip-width, hinge at the hips and grip the bar just outside shoulder width with an overhand (pronated) grip, shins close to the bar.

Hinge forward until your torso is parallel (roughly horizontal) to the floor and hold it there for every rep; keep a neutral spine, brace your core hard, and do not let the torso rise or bounce as you pull.
Pull the bar explosively in a straight line into your lower chest/upper abdomen, driving the elbows up and back and squeezing the shoulder blades together at the top.
Lower under control and let the plates fully settle (dead-stop) on the floor between every rep to reset; inhale and brace before the pull, exhale as the bar comes down.

techniqueCuesZh: 双脚与肩同宽跨在杠铃两侧（踩平台或地面），杠杆套筒上加好杠片，双手握住 V 形把手或宽握把并叠放在胸口正下方，让杠铃居中位于两腿之间。
屈髋向后送臀，躯干前倾约 45°，膝盖微屈，保持背部平直中立（挺胸、不要含胸弓背），核心收紧以保护下背。
发力时肘部向后并略向外，用肘带动（不是用手拉），顶峰处把肩胛向中间夹紧，让杠片触到或贴近胸口/下肋。
控制下放直到手臂接近伸直、背阔肌充分拉长以走完全程；上拉时呼气、下放时吸气，不要用下背猛甩借力。
techniqueCuesEn: Straddle the bar with feet shoulder-width on the platform (or floor), load plates onto the sleeve, and grip the V-handle/wide handle with both hands stacked under your chest so the bar sits centered between your legs.
Hinge at the hips and push your butt back to a torso angle around 45 degrees, keeping a slight knee bend, a flat neutral spine (chest up, no rounding), and your core braced to protect the lower back.
Pull by driving your elbows back and slightly out, leading with the elbows (not the hands), and squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top so the plates touch or reach your chest/lower ribs.
Lower the weight under control until your arms are nearly straight and the lats lengthen for full range of motion; exhale as you row up, inhale as you lower, and avoid jerking with the lower back.

techniqueCuesZh: 在高位滑轮上装窄握或对握把手（V 形把或窄杠），调好大腿挡垫把腿压实、防止下拉时被拽离座位，然后坐直，双手以约与肩同宽或更窄的距离握紧。
躯干基本保持竖直、只略微后仰（约 10-20 度），挺胸、收紧核心；下拉前先下沉并轻微后缩肩胛，用背部发力带动，而不是用胳膊拉。
把肘部向下、向内朝肋骨方向带，把把手拉向上胸；手腕保持中立、前臂与钢索成一条线，不要借惯性甩、也不要用二头硬拽。
在底部稍微夹紧背阔、停一下，再控制把手缓慢回到手臂完全伸直的充分拉伸位（别让配重砸回铁块）；下拉时呼气、回放时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Attach a close/neutral-grip handle (V-bar or narrow bar) to the high pulley, adjust the thigh pad so it pins your legs and you don't lift off the seat, then sit tall and grip with hands roughly shoulder-width or closer.

Set your torso nearly upright with only a slight backward lean (about 10-20 degrees), chest lifted, and brace your core; depress and slightly retract your shoulder blades before you pull to lead with the back, not the arms.

Drive your elbows down and in toward your ribs to pull the handle to your upper chest, keeping your wrists straight and forearms in line with the cable; avoid using momentum or yanking with the biceps.
Squeeze the lats briefly at the bottom, then control the bar back up to a full stretch with arms long (don't let the weight slam the stack); exhale as you pull down and inhale as you return.
exercises.evidenceTag: Andersen V, Fimland MS, Wiik E, Skoglund A, Saeterbakken AH. Effects of grip width on muscle strength and activation in the lat pull-down. J Strength Cond Res. 2014;28(4):1135-1142.

techniqueCuesZh: 将绳索滑轮调到最低位、挂上绳索把手；背对器械跨站，让绳索从两腿之间穿过，双手握绳后向前走一两步制造张力，双脚与肩同宽站稳，膝盖微屈。
髋部后顶发起动作，臀部笔直向器械方向后送，全程保持脊柱中立、挺胸、核心收紧；膝盖只略微弯曲，让动作由髋部主导而非腰部，手臂伸直放松（只起引导绳索的作用）。
下放到腘绳肌有强烈牵拉感（躯干接近 45°），让绳索贴近身体；随后髋部前送、夹紧臀部站直，顶端完全锁定，不要后仰或腰部过度反弓。
后送髋部时吸气并收紧核心，髋部前顶发力时呼气；离心阶段要控制住、别被绳索往回拽，把从髋铰链深拉到顶端臀部用力夹紧的全程都做满。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the cable pulley to the lowest position and attach a rope handle; face away from the machine, straddle the cable so it runs between your legs, grip the rope with both hands and walk forward a step or two to create tension, then stand with feet shoulder-width apart and a soft bend in the knees.

Hinge at the hips by pushing your butt straight back toward the machine while keeping a neutral spine, chest tall, and core braced; let the knees bend only slightly so the movement comes from the hips, not the low back, and keep your arms straight and relaxed (they only guide the rope).

Lower until you feel a strong stretch in the hamstrings (torso near 45 degrees), keeping the rope close to your body; then drive your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to stand tall, finishing in a full lockout without leaning back or overarching the lower back.

Inhale and brace as you hinge back, then exhale as you snap the hips forward; control the eccentric rather than letting the cable yank you, and own the full range from a deep hip-hinge stretch to a hard glute squeeze at the top.
Set a wide stance with feet outside shoulder-width and toes turned out (~30-45 degrees); grip the bar with hands inside your knees, shins close to the bar.
Brace and keep a flat, neutral spine throughout: chest 'proud' and up, head and eyes forward, no rounding or hyperextension of the low back or neck.
Drive the knees out over the toes and 'spread the floor' with your feet to create a stable base and keep the knees tracking the toes.
Engage the lats to keep the bar tight against your body, then extend hips and knees together to lock out tall with shoulders back.
techniqueCuesZh: 宽站距、双脚超肩宽、脚尖外展约 30–45°；双手握在膝内侧、小腿贴近杠铃。
全程收紧、背部平直中立：挺胸、目视前方，腰与颈不弓圆也不后伸。
膝盖向脚尖方向外推、双脚“撑开地面”，建立稳定底座、膝盖顺脚尖。
收紧背阔肌让杠铃贴身，再髋膝同步伸展锁定、肩向后挺直站起。
exercises.evidenceTag: Wenning, NSCA TSAC Report (2014)

techniqueCuesZh: 先调机器：靠背调到膝关节对准机器的转轴中心，脚踝挡杆压在小腿前侧、鞋口上方一点，不要压到脚背。
坐直、后背贴紧靠背，双手握住两侧把手，臀部和大腿压实坐垫，全程把下半身固定住。
用股四头肌发力、有控制地把挡杆向上蹬伸；不要借惯性甩腿、也不要猛地锁死膝关节，到顶端膝盖接近伸直时稍作停顿。
全程缓慢离心下放、控制住重量回落；伸腿时呼气、下放时吸气，若膝盖在接近完全伸直时有压力就适当减轻配重。
techniqueCuesEn: Adjust the machine first: set the backrest so your knees line up with the machine's pivot/axis, and position the ankle pad just above your shoe-tops on the front of your shins, not on your foot.
Sit tall with your back flat against the pad, grip the side handles, and keep your hips and thighs pressed down on the seat so your lower body stays anchored throughout.
Extend your knees by driving the pad up with your quads under control — don't kick with momentum or slam into a hard lockout; pause briefly at the top with knees nearly straight.
Lower the weight slowly through the full range, resisting on the way down; exhale as you extend and inhale as you lower, and ease the load near full extension if your knees feel strained.
exercises.evidenceTag: Mesfar & Shirazi-Adl, "Computational biomechanics of knee joint in open kinetic chain extension exercises," Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering (2008)

techniqueCuesZh: 站直，双脚与髋同宽，正握（掌心朝内/向下）杠铃置于大腿前侧，握距约与肩同宽；膝盖微屈，杠铃贴近身体。
脊柱中立挺拔、挺胸收核心；手臂自然垂直放松，让斜方肌发力而不是用二头肌“提”，别后仰、也别靠腿借力弹杠铃。
肩膀笔直向上耸向耳朵，尽量耸到最高，再控制下放到充分拉伸；只在肩部发力，绝不要前后绕肩——绕肩只增加关节负担、毫无额外收益。
顶端停顿、用力夹紧斜方肌；耸起时呼气、下放时吸气，全程控制节奏，不要靠晃动甩重量。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with a palms-down (pronated) grip about shoulder-width; keep a slight bend in the knees and the bar close to your body.
Set a tall, neutral spine with chest up and core braced; let your arms hang straight and relaxed so the traps—not your biceps—do the work, and avoid leaning back or using your legs to bounce the bar.

Drive your shoulders straight up toward your ears as high as possible, then lower under control to a full stretch; move only at the shoulders and do NOT roll them forward or backward, as rolling stresses the joint without adding benefit.
Pause and squeeze the traps hard at the top; exhale as you shrug up and inhale as you lower, keeping the tempo controlled rather than swinging the weight.
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Shrug (Barbell)

techniqueCuesZh: 滑轮调到最高位、接绳索把手；面背对（或面向）配重，跪在器械前方一两步处，把绳索两端拉到耳侧/太阳穴旁，臀部略往后坐，让缆绳把上身拉到一个稳定且有张力的起始位。
髋部锁死、全程保持不动——动作是脊柱屈曲（肋骨靠向骨盆），不是用髋部前倾或用手臂往下拽；肘部夹紧、绳索固定在头侧，让腹肌发力而不是肩膀代偿。
起始时把肚脐向脊柱方向收紧，肋廓朝骨盆方向卷下去，对抗缆绳拉力让脊柱一节一节卷曲，直到腹肌完全缩短。
控制还原，让配重平稳把腹肌拉伸回顶端，不要让配重砸落、也别让下背过度反弓；卷下时呼气、起身时吸气，全程让腹肌保持张力。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the pulley to its highest position with a rope attachment; kneel a foot or two in front of the stack facing away (or toward) it, hold the rope ends beside your ears/temples, and sit your hips back slightly so the cable pulls your torso into a stable, loaded start position.

Lock your hips in place and keep them motionless throughout — the movement is spinal flexion (ribs toward pelvis), NOT hinging or pulling down with the arms or hips; keep elbows tucked and the rope anchored at your head so the abs, not your shoulders, do the work.

Initiate by drawing your belly button toward your spine and curling your rib cage down toward your pelvis, rounding the spine segment by segment against the cable's pull until your abs are fully shortened.

Control the return, letting the weight smoothly stretch your abs back to the top without letting the stack slam or your lower back overarch; exhale as you crunch down, inhale as you rise, and keep tension on the abs through the full range.
Set hands shoulder-width apart (or slightly wider), fingers pointing forward or slightly inward, with shoulders stacked directly over your hands.
Brace your core, glutes, and quads so your body holds one rigid line from head to heels — never let your low back sag or your hips pike up.
Keep your head aligned with your spine (neutral neck) and tuck your elbows back toward your feet rather than flaring them straight out to the sides.
Lower under control until your chest nears the floor, then press the floor away through full elbow extension while keeping the torso rigid.
techniqueCuesZh: 双手约与肩同宽（或略宽）、指尖朝前或略内，肩部正对双手上方。
收紧核心、臀、股四头，让身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线——腰不塌、臀不抬。
头与脊柱成一线（颈中立），肘部向脚方向后收、不向两侧直张。
控制下放到胸接近地面，再撑地推到肘部完全伸直、躯干保持刚性。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Push-Up

techniqueCuesEn: Grip the bar with a pronated (overhand) full grip, palms facing away, hands about shoulder-to-1.5x shoulder width, thumbs wrapped around.
Brace your core and keep your trunk vertical with your head in line with your spine; avoid swinging or kipping the body.
Set the shoulder blades first: depress and retract the scapulae (pull shoulders down and back) before bending the elbows, and hold that position throughout.
Pull until your chin clears the bar, then lower under control until the elbows are fully extended for a full range of motion.
techniqueCuesZh: 正手满握（掌心朝外），握距约肩宽到 1.5 倍肩宽，拇指环握。
收紧核心、躯干保持竖直、头与脊柱成一线；不要摆荡或借力摆动。
先定肩胛：屈肘前先肩胛下沉后缩（肩向下向后），全程保持。
上拉到下巴过杠，再控制下放到肘部完全伸直、做满全程。
exercises.evidenceTag: ACE Exercise Library: Pull-ups

techniqueCuesEn: Grip the bars firmly with arms locked out, shoulders pulled down and back, and brace your core to keep the spine neutral.
Stay upright to bias the triceps or lean the torso slightly forward to bias the chest, keeping elbows tracking close (not flaring wide).
Lower under control until your upper arms reach about parallel to the floor; avoid dropping deeper into end-range shoulder extension.
Press back up by extending the elbows until your arms are straight, keeping the movement smooth and controlled.
techniqueCuesZh: 稳握双杠、手臂锁定，肩向下向后收，收紧核心保持脊柱中立。
躯干竖直偏重三头，略前倾偏重胸；肘部贴近轨迹（不外张）。
控制下放到上臂约与地面平行；不要沉到肩关节后伸的末端。
伸肘推起到手臂伸直，动作平稳可控。
